capability_declaration.evidence: Service Discovery phase and V2GTP capability exchange messages between EV and infrastructure
capability_declaration.rationale: Explicitly defines service profile negotiation during handshake via standardized message exchanges; scoped to charging compatibility rather than full autonomous agent operational parameters.

bounded_authority.evidence: EnergySchedule blocks (max current/power limits), AuthorizationContract constraints, and V2X certificate-based authority boundaries
bounded_authority.rationale: Establishes clear physical delivery ceilings and authorization scopes through scheduling messages; primarily addresses session bounds versus comprehensive autonomous governance frameworks.

decision_auditability.evidence: SessionLog and PaymentService transaction receipts provide operational tracking with certificate-based attribution
decision_auditability.rationale: Provides implicit audit trails for executed actions via billing/session logs; lacks explicit requirements for logging reasoning or trade-off decisions required by AI agents.

data_governance.evidence: PrivacyPolicy exchange message during protocol setup defines consent parameters per service provider
data_governance.rationale: Explicitly supports user privacy preference declaration and data access boundaries; broader ownership definitions and retention policies fall outside the standard into contractual frameworks.
